title: Manhattan DA — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across the Manhattan District Attorney (New York County District Attorney's Office) object schemas. There is NO NYC Open Data corpus for this office, so these definitions are reverse-engineered from the public website (manhattanda.org, WordPress + WP REST API), its Our Work / Victim Resources sections, and the FOIL / contact surfaces. Includes the NYC geography spine (community board, council district, census tract, NTA, BBL/BIN) even though the office's own footprint is New York County (Manhattan) — the same spine every other NYC domain uses.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

ContactInfo.description: Public contact block for an office, program, or victim service.

hotline.description: Dedicated tip / assistance line where published.

CrimeCategory.description: Subject-matter categories the office's bureaus and victim-resource pages are organized around (manhattanda.org/our-work and /victim-resources).

Bureau.description: Prosecuting / operating bureau or unit within the office (free text; common values enumerated for guidance).
